title: Mattan #4977
definition:
Mattan = "a gift"

 1) a priest of Baal in Jerusalem in the time of Athaliah
 2) father of Shephatiah in the time of Jeremiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Mattan = "a gift"

 1) a priest of Baal in Jerusalem in the time of Athaliah
 2) father of Shephatiah in the time of Jeremiah

    NASB:  a priest of Baal, also a man of Judah
